title: 到货后反馈、破损和缺件处理
theme: 从 damaged goods / missing items / claim process 开始
goals: 能礼貌接收到货后的负面反馈，不急着推卸责任
能要求客户提供 unboxing photos、数量和外箱状态，判断 damaged goods、missing items 或 short delivery
能提出 resend、compensation 或下单抵扣等补救方案

review.title: Day 26 复习
items: 昨天练了 delayed shipment、customs hold、tracking update、in transit、clearance status、estimated arrival、carrier 和 delivery exception。
物流异常阶段结束后，客户收到货可能继续反馈破损、少件或包装问题。
售后回复的重点不是先争辩责任，而是先确认事实、收集证据、给出清晰补救方案。

preview.scenario: 客户收到货后说部分产品破损、数量不对或少了配件。你需要先表达重视，然后要求照片、视频、数量和外箱情况，再提出补发、抵扣或赔偿方案。
needToKnow: damaged goods 表示收到的货物已经破损，通常需要照片确认破损程度。
missing items 表示缺少某些产品或配件，必须确认缺少的具体数量和型号。
claim process 是售后索赔流程，语气要专业，不能让客户感觉你在拖延。

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户收到货后反馈产品或包装已经损坏。
vocabulary.example: Please send us photos of the damaged goods.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户反馈收到的产品、配件或数量不完整。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the model and quantity of the missing items.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明实际到货数量少于订单或装箱清单数量。
vocabulary.example: We need to check whether this is a short delivery or a counting mistake.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户收到货后对数量、包装、质量或破损情况的反馈。
vocabulary.example: Thank you for your arrival feedback. We will check it carefully.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认货物刚打开时的产品状态、包装状态和数量。
vocabulary.example: Could you please send us the unboxing photos and carton photos?

vocabulary.meaning: 索赔流程 / 售后处理流程
vocabulary.usage: 用于正式处理破损、少件或运输损坏的售后问题。
vocabulary.example: We will start the claim process after we receive the photos.

vocabulary.usage: 用于提出现金补偿、折扣、抵扣或其他补救方式。
vocabulary.example: We can discuss reasonable compensation after we confirm the details.

vocabulary.usage: 用于少件、破损件或错误产品需要重新发送。
vocabulary.example: We can resend the missing parts with your next order.

sentences.label: 接收到货反馈
sentences.natural: Thank you for your arrival feedback. We will check it carefully.
sentences.business: Thank you for your arrival feedback. We take this seriously and will check the details carefully with our packing record.

sentences.label: 要求破损照片
sentences.natural: Please send us photos of the damaged goods.
sentences.business: Could you please send us clear photos of the damaged goods, the inner packing, and the outer cartons?

sentences.label: 确认缺件数量
sentences.natural: Please confirm the model and quantity of the missing items.
sentences.business: Please confirm the model, quantity, and carton number of the missing items so we can compare them with our packing list.

sentences.label: 判断少发还是清点错误
sentences.natural: We need to check whether this is a short delivery or a counting mistake.
sentences.business: We need to check whether this is a short delivery or a counting mistake by comparing your receiving record with our packing photos.

sentences.label: 提出补救方案
sentences.natural: We can resend the missing parts with your next order.
sentences.business: After we confirm the details, we can either resend the missing parts with your next order or discuss reasonable compensation.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气太硬，客户会觉得你不相信他的反馈。
chatAnalysis.better: Thank you for your arrival feedback. Could you please send us clear photos?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Thank you for your arrival feedback. We take this seriously. Could you please send us clear photos of the damaged goods and outer cartons so we can check it quickly?

chatAnalysis.problem: 直接推责会激化矛盾，也不利于后续索赔。
chatAnalysis.better: We need to check the details first before confirming the reason.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We need to check the details first by reviewing the unboxing photos, carton condition, and our packing record before confirming the reason.

chatAnalysis.problem: 还没确认数量和责任就承诺折扣，容易造成损失。
chatAnalysis.better: We can discuss compensation after we confirm the details.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: After we confirm the model, quantity, and photos, we can discuss a reasonable compensation plan or resend the missing parts with your next order.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户反馈破损

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We received the goods, but some items are damaged.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I am sorry to hear that. Please send us photos of the damaged goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will send the photos now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. We will check the photos and give you a solution as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We checked the cartons and found some missing items.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you for the arrival feedback. Please confirm the model and quantity of the missing items.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: It looks like ten pieces are missing from carton number five.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will compare your receiving record with our packing photos and update you today.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户要求马上赔偿

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This is unacceptable. We need compensation now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your concern, and we take this seriously.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The goods arrived late and now some products are damaged.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send us the unboxing photos, carton photos, and damaged quantity. After we confirm the details, we will offer a fair solution.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：到货后破损、缺件和售后补救

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we received the goods today, but there are some problems.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I am sorry to hear that. Thank you for your arrival feedback. What happened?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Some products are damaged, and a few items seem to be missing.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We take this seriously and will check it carefully.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This affects our customer delivery schedule.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. Could you please send us clear photos of the damaged goods first?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you also need photos of the cartons?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, please send photos of the outer cartons, inner packing, and unboxing photos if available.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The outer cartons look a little crushed.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. The carton condition will help us check whether the damage happened during transport.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: For the missing items, what information do you need?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm the model, quantity, and carton number of the missing items.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We think ten pieces of model A are missing from carton number five.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thanks. We will compare your receiving record with our packing list and packing photos.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Could this be a short delivery from your side?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We need to check whether it is a short delivery or a counting mistake before confirming the reason.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please do not delay this. We need a solution quickly.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. After we receive the photos and quantity details, we will start the claim process immediately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What solution can you offer?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If the missing items are confirmed, we can resend them with your next order or discuss compensation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What about the damaged goods?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For the damaged goods, we will check the damage level and confirm whether replacement or compensation is more suitable.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you resend the parts by courier?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, if the quantity is small and urgent, courier resend is possible. We will confirm the cost and timing.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you give me an update today?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Please send the photos and quantity details now, and I will update you today after checking with our warehouse and factory.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请发送破损货物、内包装和外箱的清晰照片。
exercises.answer: Could you please send us clear photos of the damaged goods, the inner packing, and the outer cartons?
acceptable: could you please send us clear photos of the damaged goods the inner packing and the outer cartons
please send us clear photos of the damaged goods the inner packing and the outer cartons
exercises.hint: damaged goods 是破损货物，outer cartons 是外箱。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：send photo first
exercises.answer: Thank you for your arrival feedback. Could you please send us clear photos so we can check it quickly?
acceptable: thank you for your arrival feedback could you please send us clear photos so we can check it quickly
thank you for your arrival feedback please send us clear photos so we can check it quickly
exercises.hint: 先感谢反馈，再说明要照片是为了快速处理。

exercises.prompt: 填空：We need to check whether this is a short ____ or a counting mistake.
exercises.hint: short delivery 是少发或少交货。

exercises.prompt: 客户说有缺件，哪个回复更适合？
options: Please confirm the model, quantity, and carton number of the missing items so we can compare them with our packing list.
exercises.answer: Please confirm the model, quantity, and carton number of the missing items so we can compare them with our packing list.
acceptable: please confirm the model quantity and carton number of the missing items so we can compare them with our packing list
exercises.hint: 缺件处理要确认型号、数量和箱号，再和记录对比。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：确认细节后，我们可以补发缺少的配件或讨论合理补偿。
exercises.answer: After we confirm the details, we can resend the missing parts or discuss reasonable compensation.
acceptable: after we confirm the details we can resend the missing parts or discuss reasonable compensation
after confirming the details we can resend the missing parts or discuss reasonable compensation
exercises.hint: resend 是补发，compensation 是补偿。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Some products are damaged, and we need compensation now. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: I understand your concern. Please send us the photos and damaged quantity first, and after we confirm the details, we will offer a fair solution.
acceptable: i understand your concern please send us the photos and damaged quantity first and after we confirm the details we will offer a fair solution
i understand your concern please send us the photos and damaged quantity and after we confirm the details we will offer a fair solution
exercises.hint: 先安抚，再要照片和数量，再承诺公平方案。

homework: 把 damaged goods、missing items、short delivery、arrival feedback、unboxing photos、claim process、compensation、resend 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 photos、quantity、packing record 和 compensation。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户收到货后说 10 件产品破损、5 件缺失，你要先表达重视，要求照片、箱号和数量，并说明确认后给出补发或补偿方案。
tomorrow: Day 28 会进入价格谈判和让步边界，练习客户要求 discount、best price 和 match competitor price 时如何守住条件。
